description: Design an aerodynamically optimized wind turbine rotor in QBlade using Schmitz/Betz theory. Use a NACA 4415 airfoil with a polar analyzed at Re=500,000 (AoA -5 to 20) and extrapolated to 360 degrees. The rotor must be 3-bladed with a 5m radius and 0.5m hub radius, featuring an ideal chord and twist distribution for a Design Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) of 7. Verify the performance across a TSR sweep of 1-12. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/optimized_rotor.wpa and document the maximum Power Coefficient (Cp) and the TSR at which it occurs in /home/ga/Documents/projects/results.txt.
